title: cert-manager
description: Monitor cert-manager certificate health, issuer readiness, challenge state, and ACME activity

metrics.name: certmanager_certificate_expiration_timestamp_seconds
metrics.description: Unix timestamp at which a managed certificate expires.

metrics.name: certmanager_certificate_ready_status
metrics.description: Ready condition for a managed certificate.

metrics.name: certmanager_issuer_ready_status
metrics.description: Ready condition for a namespaced issuer.

metrics.name: certmanager_clusterissuer_ready_status
metrics.description: Ready condition for a cluster issuer.

metrics.name: certmanager_certificate_challenge_status
metrics.description: Current status of ACME certificate challenges.

metrics.name: certmanager_http_acme_client_request_count
metrics.description: Total number of outbound ACME HTTP requests.
